test.description: Native contour source with `overzoom: 1`: the upstream raster-dem caps at maxzoom=12, the contour source is sampled at z=13. The 2-pixel DEM border + bbox clipping (commit 19e6ede) ensures contour lines are continuous across tile boundaries at overzoom. Centred on the corner where four z=12 DEM tiles meet so any seam discontinuity would be visible as a cross through the viewport centre.
